item.title: Kubernetes Taint and Tolerations vs Node Affinity
item.author: Author
item.description: Taint and Tolerations Limit You can make a rule that does not schedule the PODs to the specific Node, but you can not make a rule that schedules always the PODs to the specific Node. Node Affinity Limit You can make a rule that schedules the PODs to the specific Node or does not schedule the PODs to the specific Node, but you cannot make a rule that avoids to schedule to the specific Node.
